title: A Famous Author Shares Her Real Name
summary: Freida McFadden is a very popular author who writes exciting books like The Housemaid. She has always used a fake name, but now she has told everyone her real name is Sara Cohen. She did this because she was tired of keeping it a secret and wanted people to know she is a real person. Freida McFadden is a pen name she picked as a joke from a medical database. She is also a doctor who helps people with brain problems in Boston. She wrote her first book in 2013 and has sold millions of copies, making her one of the best-selling authors in the UK. She kept her writing and doctor jobs separate so her patients would not feel strange. Now, she is happy to share her true identity with her readers.

keywords.explanation: a fake name used by a writer instead of their real name
a person who helps sick people get better
selling a lot of copies and being very popular
who a person really is, including their name

questions.question: What is the real name of the author known as Freida McFadden?
Why did the author decide to reveal her real name?
options: She was tired of keeping it a secret
She wanted to sell more books
questions.correct_answer: She was tired of keeping it a secret

questions.question: What is one job the author has besides writing?
What is the name of her very popular book mentioned in the summary?
Where does the author work as a doctor?
Why did she keep her writing and doctor jobs separate?
options: So her patients would not feel weird
Because she did not like being a doctor
questions.correct_answer: So her patients would not feel weird

background_read: This article is about a famous author who uses a pen name. Many writers use fake names for different reasons, like privacy or to make their books sound more interesting. In this case, the author is also a doctor, which is a job where people help others stay healthy. She wrote a book that became a movie, showing how stories can be enjoyed in many ways. It's important to know that authors are real people with their own lives and jobs, just like everyone else.
Article_Structure: WHO: Freida McFadden, whose real name is Sara Cohen, a best-selling author and doctor.
WHAT: She revealed her true identity after using a pen name for years, tired of keeping it secret.
WHERE: She works as a doctor in Boston, Massachusetts, and her books are popular in the UK and her home country.
WHY: To show she is a real person and stop debates about her identity, while keeping her professional life separate.

perspectives.description: She wanted to be honest with readers and end the mystery about who she really is.
